summary: Added a Visual Asset Vault that centralizes generated lane avatars, minigame textures, bot portraits, source sheets, trophy art, and spare expansion portraits in a filterable game-like inventory.

queries: digital asset management gallery dashboard UI filters best practices
design system asset library gallery components filter grid UX
game inventory collection gallery UI asset vault dashboard pattern
pattern_notes: Asset libraries need predictable categories and visible metadata so growing collections stay searchable.
Component galleries favor consistent card anatomy, filtering, and visual previews over long text descriptions.
Game collection screens make progress visible by grouping items, surfacing rarity or type badges, and preserving quick drill-through.

ui_contract: The vault renders all current generated visual assets from reusable records rather than hardcoded card markup.
Filter chips show all, lane, game, agent, and system counts with browser-local persistence under agent-company-atlas.asset-filter.v1.
Lane avatar cards open Overview, game texture cards open Game, and agent portrait cards open Comms.
System cards expose shared atlas surfaces and source sheets without pretending they belong to one lane.
Responsive layout preserves readable cards on phone, laptop, and wide desktop viewports.

checks.result: Visual Asset Vault panel visible, 40 asset cards rendered, 5 filter chips rendered, 12 lane assets, 12 game assets, 11 agent assets, 5 system assets, all 40 images loaded, one-column grid, no horizontal overflow, and no console errors.
Visual Asset Vault panel visible, 40 asset cards rendered, 5 filter chips rendered, all 40 images loaded, five-column grid, no horizontal overflow, and no console errors.
Visual Asset Vault panel visible, 40 asset cards rendered, 5 filter chips rendered, all 40 images loaded, six-column grid, no horizontal overflow, and no console errors.

Clicking the Game filter rendered 12 game assets with count text '12 / 40 game'. Clicking the paid_code_bounties game asset updated the URL hash to #lane=paid_code_bounties&view=game, rendered Claim Scout lane minigame text, and activated one matching asset card.
